channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇵🇭 Gunshots at Philippine Senate as Police Standoff Escalates
item.description: More than a dozen gunshots were heard at the Philippine Senate during a standoff involving a senator with an outstanding arrest warrant. The building was placed on lockdown with personnel told to take cover.

item.title: 🇬🇧 Britain to Strengthen EU Ties in New Legislative Agenda
item.description: King Charles delivered the governments legislative agenda including legislation to strengthen ties with the European Union, as Prime Minister Keir Starmer fights to stay in power amid leadership pressure.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel Escalates Gaza Strikes as Hamas Regroups After Iran Truce
item.description: Israel has intensified attacks on Gaza in the five weeks since halting joint bombing with the US in Iran, redirecting fire back to the Palestinian enclave where Hamas fighters are tightening their grip.

item.title: 🇯🇵 OECD Projects Bank of Japan to Raise Rates to 2% by End-2027
item.description: The OECD forecasts Japan will raise its policy rate to 2% from 0.75% by end-2027, as robust domestic demand helps the economy absorb external shocks from the Middle East conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 Trumps China Summit Ambitions Shrink from Grand Bargain to Plea
item.description: President Trumps ambitions for his summit with Xi Jinping have shrunk from a grand bargain to a plea for help on Iran, as tech rivalry and distrust sap hopes for substantive AI commitments.

item.title: 🇻🇳🛢️ Vietnam seeks US approval for oil tanker to bypass Hormuz blockade
item.description: Vietnam has asked the US to allow an "extremely important" oil tanker carrying nearly 2 million barrels to pass through the Strait of Hormuz blockade. The ship is destined for Nghi Son refinery, which can process 200,000 barrels per day.

item.title: 🇱🇧⚔️ Israel strikes Lebanese highway, killing 8 including 2 children
item.description: Israeli airstrikes targeted cars on a highway south of Beirut, killing at least eight people including two children. The strikes come amid ongoing clashes between Israel and Hezbollah along the Lebanon border.

item.title: 🇦🇪🇱🇧 UAE designates 21 Lebanese citizens and groups as terrorists over Hezbollah ties
item.description: The United Arab Emirates has branded 21 Lebanese individuals and organizations as terrorists, ordering asset freezes and accusing them of connections to Hezbollah.

item.title: 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia Conducted Covert Strikes on Iran During Regional War
item.description: Saudi Arabia launched multiple unpublicized attacks on Iranian soil in retaliation for strikes on the kingdom, marking the first known direct Saudi military action against Iran. The covert operations reveal how the Iran war has drawn in regional powers beyond the US and Israel.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Military Ready for New US Assault as Trump Heads to China Summit
item.description: Iran's military says it is trained and prepared to repel any new US attack, with peace talks stalled and Trump predicting a 'long talk' about the war with Xi Jinping in Beijing. The fragile ceasefire remains on edge as both sides brace for potential escalation.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia-Ukraine Ceasefires Lose Meaning Under Trump Diplomacy
item.description: Analysis shows that temporary truces in the Ukraine war have become performative diplomacy rather than paths to lasting settlement. The pattern reflects how ceasefire agreements are now tools of political theater with diminishing practical impact on the ground.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Trump Arrives in Beijing for High-Stakes Summit With Xi Jinping
item.description: President Trump lands in China for a multi-day state visit carrying global consequences as the world's two largest economies navigate trade disputes, Taiwan tensions, and the Iran war. AI cooperation and energy security top the agenda.

item.title: 🤖 Tech Rivalry Overshadows AI Push at Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: US officials say AI will be central to Trump-Xi talks but substantive commitments are unlikely given deepening tech rivalry and mutual distrust. The strategic importance of artificial intelligence highlights the technology's role in great power competition.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 Bessent and Chinese VP hold talks in South Korea ahead of Trump-Xi summit
item.description: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Chinese Vice Premier He Lifeng concluded three hours of talks in South Korea aimed at laying groundwork for this week's Beijing summit between Trump and Xi.

item.title: 🇧🇾 Lukashenko Announces Military Mobilization as Belarus Prepares for War
item.description: Belarusian President Alexander Lukashenko announced a rotational mobilization of selected military units, stating "We are all preparing for war" amid heightened regional tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russian Strikes Kill 8 in Dnipropetrovsk Region Overnight
item.description: Russian overnight strikes on Ukraine's Dnipropetrovsk region killed eight people and injured at least 11 as Moscow continued its aerial campaign.

item.title: ⚔️ Russian Nuclear Submarines Receive Anti-Drone Defenses Thousands of Miles From Ukraine
item.description: New satellite imagery reveals anti-drone protections around Russian nuclear submarines, suggesting commanders fear Ukrainian drone capabilities extending far beyond the front lines.

item.title: 🇰🇷 South Korea Weighs Phased Hormuz Support After US Talks
item.description: South Korea is reviewing a phased contribution to efforts to ensure safe navigation through the Strait of Hormuz, signaling support steps short of military participation as the US seeks allies for the Iran mission.

item.title: 💰 Pentagon: US War in Iran Has Cost $29 Billion
item.description: A senior Pentagon official said the US war in Iran has cost $29 billion so far, an increase of $4 billion from estimates late last month, as lawmakers query costs and Trump renews strike threats.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 US and China Agree on Opposing Hormuz Shipping Tolls
item.description: Senior US and Chinese officials agree that no country should exact shipping tolls in the Strait of Hormuz, a sign both countries are trying to find common ground on pressuring Iran to give up control of the vital waterway.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Bond Vigilantes Exact Price on Government as Yields Hit 28-Year High
item.description: Britain's long-dated government borrowing costs have surged to their highest since 1998 as concern over potential leadership change weakens fiscal discipline, with 30-year gilt yields hitting 5.81%.

item.title: 📉 G7 Long Bond Stress Intensifies Amid Rising Borrowing Costs
item.description: The relentless rise in long-term government borrowing costs shows no sign of abating, with stress building in world markets as stock markets defy gravity.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan president thanks US for defense support ahead of Trump-Xi meeting
item.description: Taiwan President Lai Ching-te expressed thanks to the US for strengthening the island's defenses and said Taipei would not give in to pressure, as Trump prepares to meet Xi in Beijing.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China warns ready to crush Taiwan independence bid before Trump summit
item.description: China reiterated its strong opposition to US arms sales to Taiwan and declared its capability to crush any independence bid is unbreakable, just ahead of President Trumps arrival in Beijing for a high-stakes summit with Xi Jinping.

item.title: 🇧🇷 BRICS foreign ministers meet in Delhi with Iran war casting shadow
item.description: The US-Israeli war on Iran is set to dominate discussions at the BRICS foreign ministers meeting in New Delhi, testing the blocs ability to reach a unified position. China Foreign Minister Wang Yi will skip the meeting due to scheduling conflicts with Trump visit.
